en.extract:
The friendly bush warbler (Locustella accentor), also known as the Kinabalu friendly warbler, is a species of Old World warbler in the family Locustellidae. It is endemic to the island of Borneo.

The '''friendly bush warbler''' ('''''Locustella accentor'''''), also known as the '''Kinabalu friendly warbler''', is a species of [[Old World warbler]] in the family [[Locustellidae]]. It is endemic to the island of [[Borneo]].<ref>{{cite book |title=Phillipps' Field Guide to the Birds of Borneo |last1=Phillipps |first1=Quentin |last2=Phillipps |first2=Karen |name-list-style=amp |year=2011 |publisher=John Beaufoy Publishing |location=Oxford, UK |isbn=978-1-906780-56-2}}</ref>
